name: claim_number_not_null
expression: claim_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(claim_number)) > 0
description: Claim number is the primary key for downstream remittance reconciliation and HIPAA 835 transaction matching — no valid EOB record without it

name: avg_confidence_minimum
description: Overall extraction confidence below 0.65 indicates document quality or format issues too severe for reliable automated processing — route to human review queue

name: claim_status_valid_enum
description: Claim status must be a recognized adjudication outcome; invalid values break downstream remittance posting workflows and denial management routing

name: billed_amount_positive
expression: billed_amount IS NOT NULL AND billed_amount > 0
description: Billed amount must be present and positive — zero or null indicates claim header extraction failure; cannot reconcile remittance without charge amount

name: patient_member_id_present
expression: patient_member_id IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(patient_member_id)) > 0
description: Member ID is required for eligibility verification and patient account matching; missing value prevents automated posting — flag for manual resolution

name: paid_amount_non_negative
description: Paid amount cannot be negative; negative value indicates extraction error or overpayment recovery scenario requiring manual review

name: denial_reason_required_for_denied
description: Denied claims must have a CARC denial reason code for appeals processing and denial management reporting; missing code flags extraction gap

name: provider_npi_format
expression: provider_npi IS NULL OR (LENGTH(provider_npi) = 10 AND provider_npi REGEXP '^[0-9]{10}$')
description: NPI must be exactly 10 numeric digits per HIPAA standard; format violation indicates extraction confusion with Tax ID or other identifiers
